title: Citation-resolution audit of experimental/asymptotic_rs_mca.tex thm:closed-ledger-package
what_this_is: A citation-resolution and statement-level-match audit. For each descriptive bracket-citation in the (C1)-(C9) cell paragraphs and the four definitional joints, the actual labeled result in the named source is located (file+line+verbatim head) and classified FOUND-EXACT / FOUND-WEAKER / FOUND-AMBIGUOUS / PHANTOM.
what_this_is_not: NOT a re-proof. The internal correctness of the cited proofs is not re-verified. This is collaborative input to the maintainer's own promotion decision; it does not itself promote or block.
pattern_reference: experimental/notes/audits/lean_grande_finale_correspondence_audit.md (the house #418 Lean-correspondence audit: FOUND/DIVERGENT/PHANTOM per claim).

cited_titles: The Moduli Ledger for the Asymptotic Reed-Solomon MCA Frontier
moduli_manuscripts_absent.statement: No file named *moduli* exists in the tree; the manuscript titles and the distinctive C9 vocabulary appear only inside asymptotic_rs_mca.tex itself. As of eb42b82 the steering (agents.md) itself names experimental/rs_mca_moduli_ledger_final.tex, which is likewise absent.
moduli_manuscripts_absent.corroboration: The #418 Lean audit independently flagged that QFourierTao.lean/QEntropyInverse.lean 'cite labels and a manuscript file that exist nowhere in the repo'.

verdict_totals_scope: Tallied over all 54 citation-resolution entries: 51 cell citations (C1-C9) plus joints B1,B3,B4. B2 is a structural mapping (verdict field STRUCTURAL) and is excluded from the 4-way tally.

joints.name: NORMALIZATION

cited_source_object.label: thm:fourier-flat-q proves the bound normalized by Q^{-w} (ambient E^w)

companion.label: prob:entropy-inverse-q normalizes by |K|^R; def:primitive-logmoment by |B|^{-w}
companion.quote: primitive entropic inverse theorem for Vandermonde slice sums

joints.resolution: The cited Fourier-flat Q section proves Q in the AMBIENT (Q^w = q^R-type) normalization, not the image normalization the paper's leaf uses.
joints.missing_lemma: A printed bridge: |im Phi| = |K|^R * exp(o(N)) uniformly in the frontier window (equivalently, log(M/L) and log(M/|K|^R) differ by o(N)). Not printed; implicit.

joints.name: WINDOW-UNIFORMITY

paper_assumption.label: thm:frontier assumes ledger holds uniformly in every o(n)-window

cited_source_object.label: grande's own closure theorem makes window-uniformity an explicit hypothesis
cited_source_object.quote: if the same hypotheses hold uniformly for agreements

joints.resolution: Per-cell ledgers (e.g. thm:capf-census, thm:capf-planted, def:primitive-logmoment) are stated at a FIXED agreement m=k+1+w, not uniformly over an o(n)-window. Window-uniformity is an undischarged assumption -- carried identically in the paper and in grande's thm:asymptotic-rs-mca-closure-combined; neither discharges it.
joints.missing_lemma: A window-uniform restatement of the per-cell budgets (or explicit acknowledgement that the assumption is imported verbatim from grande, where it is equally a hypothesis).

joints.name: LOWER-SIDE

paper_object.label: identity-prefix pole construction; 'subexponential in the standard pole-reservoir regime'

cited_source_object.label: grande prop:pole-line (same f_alpha,g_alpha,ell_S(alpha)) -- flags but does not bound the collision loss
cited_source_object.quote: up to collisions in the displayed evaluation map

collision_free_alternative.label: cap_v13 lem:capff1-identity-prefix-floor achieves the SAME numerator via an injective (loss-free) map

reservoir_floor.label: grande thm:simple-pole-list-floor bounds collisions among L list codewords via the reservoir F\D

joints.resolution: The construction is FOUND-EXACT (prop:pole-line, verbatim). But 'pole-reservoir regime' appears in NO source, and no source bounds the collision loss of the pole map S -> ell_S(alpha) at the frontier support-family scale; prop:pole-line explicitly defers it, and the collision-FREE route (lem:capff1-identity-prefix-floor + deep-point conversion) is a different, injective construction.
joints.missing_lemma: A printed subexponential bound on the fibers of S -> ell_S(alpha) for S in Fib_w(z) at the frontier scale, OR a citation redirect to the injective identity-prefix floor + deep-point conversion as the actual source of the exp(-o(n)) lower bound.

external_tools.note: Energy form: E(A) >= |A|^3/K yields A' with |A'| >= K^{-C}|A|, |A'-A'| <= K^C|A'|, C absolute. Standard BSG/Gowers energy statement. Not re-proved.
MRSZ2020/GMRSZ2020 form: U subset {0,1}^d gives |P+Q+U| >= |P|^{1/2}|Q|^{1/2}|U| for finite nonempty P,Q subset Z^d. Standard. Not re-proved.

Pure logic, verified here: P=-A (|P|=|A|), Q={0} (|Q|=1), U=A (|U|=|A|); P+Q+U = A-A; RHS = |A|^{1/2}*1^{1/2}*|A| = |A|^{3/2}. Hence |A-A| >= |A|^{3/2}. Hypotheses U subset {0,1}^N, P,Q subset Z^N finite nonempty all met.

promotion_readiness.B1: NEEDS: printed image=ambient(q^R) normalization bridge lemma (|im Phi| = |K|^R exp(o(N)) in-window)
promotion_readiness.B3: NEEDS: window-uniform restatement of per-cell budgets, or explicit import of grande's uniform hypothesis
promotion_readiness.B4: NEEDS: printed pole-map collision-loss bound at frontier scale, or citation redirect to the injective identity-prefix floor

nonclaims: Internal correctness of any cited proof was NOT re-verified.
The BSG and quasicube literature theorems were NOT re-proved; only their stated forms were matched to standard statements (the quasicube boolean-difference derivation was verified as pure logic).
No judgement is made on whether the missing moduli manuscripts, if supplied, would close C9 -- only that they are absent from the tree.
This audit does not promote or block; it is collaborative input to the maintainer's promotion decision.

steering_alignment.mandate: agents.md (eb42b82) priority 2 mandates adversarial proof audits ending in NO ISSUE / FIXED / OPEN GAP / COUNTEREXAMPLE_NEW_FLOOR with exact file/label references; this packet is that audit class for the citation layer.
steering_alignment.no_issue_composition: 48 FOUND-EXACT cell citations + B2 structural map + BSG statement match + quasicube statement-and-derivation check
steering_alignment.open_gap_composition: 3 PHANTOM C9 citations (moduli manuscripts absent; steering-named experimental/rs_mca_moduli_ledger_final.tex not in tree at eb42b82) + B1 normalization bridge + B3 window uniformity + B4 lower-side collision loss
